evals.name: flat-profile
evals.prompt: I profiled my game and there's no single hotspot — everything is around 0.5%. What should I do now?
evals.expected_output: Recognizes the flat profile as the mature case, advises accepting it or making an architectural change rather than grinding many tiny items for a big win, and mentions measuring work-per-unit-time rather than raw throughput.
expectations: Explicitly recognizes the flat-profile situation as the mature case
Advises accepting it or making an architectural change rather than grinding many tiny items for a big win
Mentions measuring work-per-unit-time rather than raw throughput
